title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Paytm Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Paytm Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
